'''dothangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylological|xylological]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylological|xylological]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dothangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dothangithi|dothangithi]] || [[word:dothangiji|dothangiji]] || [[word:dothangishi|dothangishi]] || [[word:dothangiki|dothangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dothanguthuthu|dothanguthuthu]] || [[word:dothangujuju|dothangujuju]] || [[word:dothangushushu|dothangushushu]] || [[word:dothangukuku|dothangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dothanguthu|dothanguthu]] || [[word:dothanguju|dothanguju]] || [[word:dothangushu|dothangushu]] || [[word:dothanguku|dothanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dothangufthuf|dothangufthuf]] || [[word:dothangufjuf|dothangufjuf]] || [[word:dothangufshuf|dothangufshuf]] || [[word:dothangufkuf|dothangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dothangethe|dothangethe]] || [[word:dothangeje|dothangeje]] || [[word:dothangeshe|dothangeshe]] || [[word:dothangeke|dothangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dothangothotho|dothangothotho]] || [[word:dothangojojo|dothangojojo]] || [[word:dothangoshosho|dothangoshosho]] || [[word:dothangokoko|dothangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dothangotho|dothangotho]] || [[word:dothangojo|dothangojo]] || [[word:dothangosho|dothangosho]] || [[word:dothangoko|dothangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dothangofthof|dothangofthof]] || [[word:dothangofjof|dothangofjof]] || [[word:dothangofshof|dothangofshof]] || [[word:dothangofkof|dothangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfthĂŻf|dothangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfjĂŻf|dothangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfshĂŻf|dothangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfkĂŻf|dothangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dothangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dothangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dothangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dothangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfthĂŻf|dothangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfjĂŻf|dothangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfshĂŻf|dothangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfkĂŻf|dothangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfthĂŻf|dothangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfjĂŻf|dothangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfshĂŻf|dothangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dothangĂŻfkĂŻf|dothangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dothangĂŠthĂŠ|dothangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dothangĂŠjĂŠ|dothangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dothangĂŠshĂŠ|dothangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dothangĂŠkĂŠ|dothangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dothangathatha|dothangathatha]] || [[word:dothangajaja|dothangajaja]] || [[word:dothangashasha|dothangashasha]] || [[word:dothangakaka|dothangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dothangatha|dothangatha]] || [[word:dothangaja|dothangaja]] || [[word:dothangasha|dothangasha]] || [[word:dothangaka|dothangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dothangafthaf|dothangafthaf]] || [[word:dothangafjaf|dothangafjaf]] || [[word:dothangafshaf|dothangafshaf]] || [[word:dothangafkaf|dothangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dothangasha|dothangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dothangshĂ«asha|dothangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dothangroasha|dothangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dothangmuasha|dothangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dothangyaasha|dothangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godothangnkshĂ«asha|godothangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godothangnkroasha|godothangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godothangnkmuasha|godothangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godothangnkyaasha|godothangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dothathangasha|dothathangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dothathangshĂ«asha|dothathangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dothathangroasha|dothathangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dothathangmuasha|dothathangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dothathangyaasha|dothathangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godothathangnkshĂ«asha|godothathangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godothathangnkroasha|godothathangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godothathangnkmuasha|godothathangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godothathangnkyaasha|godothathangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dethĂŠngasha|dethĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dethĂŠngshĂ«asha|dethĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dethĂŠngroasha|dethĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dethĂŠngmuasha|dethĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dethĂŠngyaasha|dethĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godethĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|godethĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godethĂŠngnkroasha|godethĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godethĂŠngnkmuasha|godethĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godethĂŠngnkyaasha|godethĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dothfangasha|dothfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dothfangshĂ«asha|dothfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dothfangroasha|dothfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dothfangmuasha|dothfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dothfangyaasha|dothfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godothfangnkshĂ«asha|godothfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godothfangnkroasha|godothfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godothfangnkmuasha|godothfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godothfangnkyaasha|godothfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
